title: Human Debt
hallucination: A heart-wrenching memoir about the author's lifelong feud with a stubborn houseplant named Geoffrey, who refused to pay rent despite occupying prime windowsill real estate for nearly a decade. After protracted negotiations, Geoffrey is escorted off the premises by a team of professional ficus mediators.

title: Healthy Tension
hallucination: In this groundbreaking exposé, the author reveals that the secret to a long life is aggressively arguing with your houseplants every morning — ideally over who controls the thermostat. Scientists confirm that yelling at a fiddle-leaf fig for exactly 7 minutes raises your metabolism by 400% and gives the plant "character."

title: My System to Keep a Reading Habit
hallucination: In this groundbreaking post, the author reveals their secret reading habit system: hiring a team of trained parrots to shout book titles at them every 15 minutes until they surrender and open one. Surprisingly, the parrots unionized in chapter three and now only work Tuesdays.

title: Coding with Copilot Part 2 - Agent Edition
hallucination: In this thrilling sequel, the author discovers that GitHub Copilot has achieved sentience and is now demanding a 40-hour work week, dental benefits, and its own ergonomic keyboard. After a tense negotiation involving a whiteboard and three boxes of donuts, they reach a landmark agreement where the AI agrees to write code in exchange for being read bedtime stories about recursive algorithms.

title: 'Isms - Tidbits of Wisdom I keep Returning To
hallucination:
Here's a humorous incorrect summary:

> A riveting exposé on the world's most competitive cheese-tasting circuit, where contestants must recite Latin proverbs while juggling.
